title: adelia segregata
intro: Adelia segregata, also known as Phyllanthus niruri, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the Americas and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Adelia segregata include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of diabetes, and supporting liver health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Adelia segregata can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
